name: Over The Toilet Storage Black Metal and Wood - Brightroom™: Space-Saving Bathroom Organizer with 3 Fixed Shelves
description:
Add more storage options to your bathspace without taking up too much space with this Over-The-Toilet Storage Black Metal from Brightroom™. This space-saving storage rack is designed to fit over most standard toilets. It features a natural wood and black metal construction with a rust-resistant finish for easy style that coordinates with any decor. The three open shelves provide ample space to store and display towels, potted plants, bath items, toiletries and more in one place.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
